raw_text:
<think>
The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave specific values: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs.

We need to output those lines, exactly in order: route_verdict=..., repair_target=..., blocked_move=..., each on its own line. No extra headings, no JSON, no markdown. So plain text:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no trailing spaces or extra lines.

Thus final.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
